title: Absolute Performance
description: Use this modpack for an absolute optimisation of your Minecraft's fps
body:
This Minecraft modpack will boost your game's FPS! From god-tiered gaming pcs to budget potato laptops, this modpack will ensure that your Minecraft gaming experience is improved. When you download and use this modpack, it will optimise your gameplay by increasing its fps and reducing lag, all without changing the look and feel of the game. Just Absolute Performance. 

Mods Included:
[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Moreculling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling), [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric), [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl), [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api), [Modernfix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix), [Modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton), [Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast), [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe), [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify), [ Concurrent Chunk Management Engine ](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric), [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
[Please note that some mods may not be in every version of modpacks due to their compatibility]
